title: deschampsia cespitosa subsp. holciformis
intro: Deschampsia cespitosa subsp. holciformis, also known as the tufted hair grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Deschampsia cespitosa subsp. holciformis include its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing, making it a useful natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Deschampsia cespitosa subsp. holciformis include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to the affected area to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
